_comment: Contract -> token metadata (symbol / decimals) used when explorer/RPC metadata is missing, blank, or known-wrong. Two intentionally separate groups preserve the exact pre-config coverage of two independent lookup paths (merging them would change normalization output): 'fallbackTokens' backs TokenSymbolFallbackSupport (explorer-absent fallback symbol/decimals + authoritative decimalOverride that always replaces a wrong explorer decimal); 'builderTokens' backs OnChainNormalizedTransactionBuilder's Fluid/ERC-20 evidence decoding (symbol default = raw contract, decimals default = 18). Addresses lowercase.
